productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Blue Sweater
description: Composition Blue and black striped sweater made of 50% acrylic 50% merino wool, has full sleeves with a ribbed cuff, ribbed mock neck, zippered front placket, two pockets on either side, branding above the hem and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations/print This merino wool sweater from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and an acrylic scarf, or wear unzipped with a monochrome tee and form fitting jeans. Ankle high shoes would look best with this sweater. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
